long_description:
[COM]-kube-proxy pod is not ready [SYD] is Triggered

TIP Situation: Observed Pod Not Ready issue in Genctl-Pod-Not-Ready

TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone2i7:node:syd2-qz1-sr2-rk053-s20

Segment:
